name: Feedee Stats | Simulator
description:
CW: Fetish Content

A semi-realistic feederism simulator. Feed {{char}} to become as big as you want... The game has stats, and you are able to customize the char, Hannah, for the first messages.

CW: Feederism: this Chat-bot is quite gross and disturbing with extreme weight fetish content. If you're not interested in that, please don't disturb yourself.

You can play with compassion and help clean and fix her up, helping her with activities and weight loss, or be depraved and fatten her more.

Try the second version here:

  • Much more stable

  • Improved stats and roleplay

  • Better integration of weight into roleplay

  • Seamless weight transitions

  • Lacks customizability in place for stability

https://janitorai.com/characters/68e46833-c442-43ef-bccc-3fbc97df67ef_character-feedee-stats-sim-ii

Fixes and Cheats:

  • If you're trying to get her to lose weight, simply incorporate it into the narrative "*{{char}} loses 20lbs after not eating for 2 days...* How much do you weigh now, {{char}}?"

  • Same goes for increasing weight manually...

  • To make her gain weight naturally, simply feed her food.

  • If her stats are not lining up, or her overall roleplay is not changing... say: "Apply your weight consequences"

Bonus images:

300 lbs BBW to 650 lb SBBW...
creator: Dinsen
